profile_digest_semantics: SHA-256 over retrieved representation-data bytes after transfer and HTTP content codings are removed, before media parsing, charset conversion, or normalization; URI fragments do not affect retrieval bytes.

limitations: C2PA supports embedded and externally stored manifests, so the generic scheme does not guarantee a content-borne signal.
Registration and successful C2PA validation do not by themselves establish an independently operated observation of content use.
The ceiling applies only to instances with a valid C2PA claim, accepted signer identity, exact subject binding, trusted time, and a portable independent-verifier attestation satisfying section 5.8.
Transform survivability is profile-version and transform specific. See survivability-matrix-c2pa-text.json; no universal survivability claim is made.
Reserved for a future profile combining ISCC content identification with a separately specified registry and verification procedure.
No profile is registered and no tier above claim is available from this entry.
